productDisplayName: Wrangler Women's Agate Green Secret Socks
description: CompositionGreen socks made of 100% cotton, with purple border at the ankle, and purple knitted patch at the heel and toesWash careMachine wash warm in not more than 40 degreesUse non-chlorine bleach if neededDo not use softenersTumble dry lowDo not dry cleanDo not ironGuaranteed to stay soft and cushioned after multiple washes, these socks from wrangler are ideal wear with sneakers or floaters. The elastic is suited to sit snug on your ankle and make you feel comfortable all day while the forefoot can be stretched enough to Fit the widest of feet. Add style to your attire with these socks and feel free to step in comfort.
